title: Wolf Sweater
description: Replaces the wolf armor with a turtleneck dog sweater!
body:
## Replaces the wolf armor with a comfortable and stylish turtleneck dog sweater designed after scrungo! Available only at Steve Co.
The photo this resource pack is based on belongs to **Nathan W. Pyle** (**@nathanwpyle** on Twitter)

Works with Fresh Animations, though it can look a bit funky at times.

Maybe I'll get around to finally updating this in around seven years.
